notes: Solid breakout implementation with mouse+keyboard controls, multi-level progression, audio, and hi-score; minor issue is the paddle movement blends mouse and keyboard input simultaneously causing slight jitter, and brick collision side detection can occasionally misfire.
Excellent functionality and visual polish, but keyboard controls are practically unusable because they constantly fight the mouse interpolation logic.

Solid Breakout implementation with working levels, scoring, lives, and pause flow, but mouse auto-centering interferes with pure keyboard control and collision/physics remain somewhat simplistic rather than polished.
